name: We Play Sports Arena
description: A popular multi-sport facility in Gokarneshwor offering high-quality turf and evening lighting.

name: Dhanawantari Futsal
description: One of the oldest and most well-known futsal hubs in Kathmandu with professional-grade surfacing.

name: Tahachal Futsal
description: Conveniently located in Tahachal, providing a great atmosphere for local matches and tournaments.

name: Mates Futsal
description: A friendly community arena perfect for casual games with friends and colleagues.

name: United Futsal
description: Located in Bafal, this arena is known for its well-maintained pitch and competitive local leagues.

name: Vajra Futsal
description: Situated near the Swoyambhu area, offering a great view and a standard-sized futsal court.

name: Swoyambhu Recreation Center
description: A multi-purpose sports center on the Ring Road with easy accessibility and parking.

name: Futsal Park
description: Quiet location in Nagarjun with a focus on providing a quality playing experience for ballers.

name: Balami Futsal
description: Affordable and popular spot in Sitapaila for youth teams and morning practitioners.

name: Sitapaila Recreation Center
description: Equipped with modern turf and amenities, hosting various local sports events.
